feed.title: The Git Times
feed.subtitle: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

entry.title: AIRI's Alpha Release Polishes Game-Playing AI Companions for Everyday Use
entry.summary: “We are as gods and might as well get good at it.” — Stewart Brand

entry.title: Superpowers Framework Turns AI Coding Agents into Methodical Engineers
entry.summary: “The information you have is not the information you want. The information you want is not the information you need.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: Attention Residuals Let Transformers Selectively Tap Deeper Layer Wisdom
entry.summary: “We live in a society exquisitely dependent on science and technology, in which hardly anyone knows anything about science and technology.” — Carl Sagan

entry.title: Lightpanda Delivers Zig-Built Headless Browser for Lightning-Fast AI Automation
entry.summary: “We drive into the future using only our rearview mirror.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: Lightpanda: Zig-Powered Headless Browser Turbocharges AI Automation
entry.summary: “Technology is a gift of God. After the gift of life it is perhaps the greatest of God's gifts.” — Freeman Dyson

entry.title: gstack Turns Claude into a Slash-Command Dev Team for Solo Builders
entry.summary: “We can only see a short distance ahead, but we can see plenty there that needs to be done.” — Alan Turing

entry.title: CLI-Anything Turns Any Desktop App into AI Agent Command Line
entry.summary: “The economy of human time is the next advantage of machinery in manufactures.” — Charles Babbage

entry.title: OpenClaw Delivers Always-On Personal AI Across Every Chat App You Use
entry.summary: “There's no sense in being precise when you don't even know what you're talking about.” — John von Neumann

entry.title: GitHub Repo Exposes System Prompts Fueling Top AI Coding Agents
entry.summary: “Civilization advances by extending the number of important operations which we can perform without thinking about them.” — Alfred North Whitehead

entry.title: NullClaw Delivers Tiny Zig AI Assistant for Any Hardware
entry.summary: “One accurate measurement is worth a thousand expert opinions.” — Grace Hopper

entry.title: AI Agents Automate Frontier LLM Research on a Single GPU Overnight
entry.summary: “Those who can imagine anything, can create the impossible.” — Alan Turing

entry.title: Antigravity Awesome Skills Arms AI Agents with 1,273 Battle-Tested Coding Playbooks
entry.summary: “Science is what we understand well enough to explain to a computer; art is everything else.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: AirI Unleashes Self-Hosted AI Companions That Play Games and Chat in Real Time
entry.summary: “At each increase of knowledge, as well as on the contrivance of every new tool, human labour becomes abridged.” — Charles Babbage

entry.title: PinchTab Gives AI Agents Lightning-Fast Control Over Chrome Browsers
entry.summary: “The best programs are written so that computing machines can perform them quickly and so that human beings can understand them clearly.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: One CLI Masters Google Workspace APIs Dynamically for Devs and AI Agents
entry.summary: “Programs are meant to be read by humans and only incidentally for computers to execute.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: Open-Source World Monitor Delivers Palantir-Like Global Intelligence Dashboard
entry.summary: “In mathematics you don't understand things. You just get used to them.” — John von Neumann

entry.title: Desloppify Harnesses AI Agents to Sculpt Sloppy Code into Beautiful Engineering
entry.summary: “Before you become too entranced with gorgeous gadgets, remember that the greatest invention of all was the book.” — Arthur C. Clarke

entry.title: Reverse-Engineered APIs Unlock Neural Training on Apple Neural Engine
entry.summary: “Sometimes it is the people no one imagines anything of who do the things that no one can imagine.” — Alan Turing

entry.title: Claude Context Mode Compresses Tool Outputs to Salvage AI Context Windows
entry.summary: “Premature optimization is the root of all evil.” — Donald Knuth

entry.title: CoPaw Launches as Self-Hosted AI Assistant for Developers
entry.summary: “Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.” — Arthur C. Clarke
